channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI observability: the 3 things logs miss
item.description: AI observability cuts support tickets 80% by tracking prompt drift, semantic fidelity, and data lineage — not just latency and errors. Learn the 3 missing signals and how to instrument them with concrete code and real production numbers from a 2026 system.

item.title: One payment stack for Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana
item.description: Reduce payment failure rates 60% with one abstraction layer instead of three integrations — latency benchmarks, cost savings, and the mistake that cost $2k

item.title: Schema-per-tenant cost us 170% more than RLS
item.description: Cut database costs 60% by swapping schema-per-tenant for row-level security — benchmark data, RLS policies, and the one mistake that cost us 170% more than RLS in 2026

item.title: Migrations break prod: rollback is the real test
item.description: Zero-downtime migrations fail when rollback scripts hit 45-minute locks on 200 GB tables. Measure impact, not uptime. Use backward-compatible changes, batch backfills, and rollforward.

item.title: MCP servers crash: tool call timeout after 5s
item.description: Cut MCP server timeouts 100% by overriding the hidden 5s default — exact commands, SDK pins, and the Istio timeout trap most teams miss.

item.title: 2026 alert triage: when Opsgenie slept for you
item.description: They suppress alerts that have a 92% chance of resolving on their own, they collapse related incidents into one ticket, and they surface only the…

item.title: Year one: Claude Code’s slow-burn wins
item.description: Cut 80% of PR review time using Claude Code 1.6 in 2026 with strict type, lint, and coverage gates that actually stick.

item.title: Regulations forced better APIs: the 2026 fintech
item.description: Reduce API callback loss 99% with durable state machines — Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya fintech compliance in 2026 without over-engineering

item.title: Test AI code, not the AI
item.description: Cut AI test failures 60% with contract-first testing — OpenAPI snapshots, Pydantic validations, and behavior-driven tests that ignore AI internals

item.title: 7 passive income streams for devs in 2026
item.description: Earn KES 50k–250k/month without SaaS — 7 tested ways with AWS, GitHub, and Stripe in 2026. Compare setup time, revenue ceiling, and real AWS costs.

item.title: Tech salaries 2026: what corrected, what grew
item.description: In 2026 Nairobi tech salaries split 35-50% between generalist CRUD roles and high-leverage platform roles — compare exact numbers and learn which skills moved up and which stayed flat.

item.title: JSON mode doesn’t validate outputs
item.description: Cut AI parsing failures 36% with JSON Schema validation — why JSON mode fails, how to validate outputs, and the 3-step pipeline that works in 2026.

item.title: GIL-free Python 3.13: double web server speed
item.description: Cut API response time 40% with Python 3.13 free-threaded GIL removal — benchmarks, thread safety traps, and the one command to try tonight

item.title: AI interviews break systems: 5 real mistakes in 2026
item.description: The symptom is consistent: the candidate submits a Go 1.22 service, a Node 20 LTS frontend, and a Terraform 1.6 stack, but the build fails with this exact…

item.title: LLM security mistakes in 2026: OWASP Top 10 fixes
item.description: Cut LLM security risks 65% with OWASP Top 10 fixes — 3 concrete numbers, code samples, and the 2026 edition of the OWASP LLM Top 10.

item.title: USSD apps: why African fintech still needs them in 2026
item.description: USSD apps still drive 34% of new signups in African fintech in 2026. Build a production-grade USSD interface with Redis 7.2, FastAPI, and Twilio in 450 lines. Latency, cost, and hiring data included.

item.title: AI codebase? Guardrails over guardrails
item.description: Cut false-positive alerts 30% with SonarQube 10.4 vs GitHub Advanced Security — connection pool crashes, XPath rules, and the $81 monthly price tag most teams miss.

item.title: False positives killed our CI scans — here’s how we
item.description: Cut security scan noise 78% with dynamic suppression — semgrep 1.71, Trivy 0.53, and a Redis 7.2 cache that expires false positives in 30 days.

item.title: Run APIs in 50 spots: what breaks first
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by running in 50 edge locations — cache stampedes, clock drift, and write fan-out mistakes most teams make in 2026.

item.title: Webhooks 2026: retries, idempotency, and the 99.95%
item.description: Cut webhook failures 95% with Redis Streams, Lambda SnapStart, and idempotency keys — p99 latency 780 ms, cost $1.01 per 1,000 events in 2026
